final:
module d_flip_flop (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire rst,  
    input wire en,  
    input wire obf_D,  
    output reg Q  
);  
always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin  
    if (rst) begin  
        Q <= 0;  
    end else if (en) begin  
        Q <= obf_D;  
    end  
end  
endmodule
